TestCase z16Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_v = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_v, t1.v, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.v = follow_case_v;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n < 1
    if (follow_case.n < 1) {
        // No elements to modify, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code: multiply a random element by -1.0
    int random_idx = rand() % follow_case.n;
    follow_case.v[random_idx] *= -1.0;
    
    return follow_case;
}
